name: Sumeria
startIntroPart1: The neverending glory be upon you. King Gilgamesh, most legendary and mystical ruler of Sumeria! Oh mighty king, whose hands built the city-walls of Uruk and eyes saw the sage Utnapishtim! You are the leader of the Sumer, the first and the only civilization that was truely original and innovative. Sumer's history stretches back into time when the Gods were walking alongside the mere mortals. Sumer, the cradle of civilization, made a great progress in our history, gave the world most beatiful things - literature, architecture and music - and developed professional army, immortalizing the very first battle in the stele. Sumer's contributions to the civlization of man are uncountable.
startIntroPart2: Divine King, who, with strength and wisdom, built the glory of the ancient Sumer and became the very first hero of the history - people seek for your guidance! The wealth of Euphrates, Tigris and the whole Fertile Crescent cannot be wasted in the hands of barbarians. Can you once more bring glory and light to the humankind? Can you build a civilization to stand the test of time?
declaringWar: Why do I fight? Because I can... because Inanna demands it. Now you will know the power of Sumer!
attacked: I will enjoy hearing your last breath when you witness the destruction of your people.
defeated: The time has come. Mere mortals challenged the Gods and overthrew them, destroying the old world and proudly awaiting the new one.
introduction: I am Gilgamesh of Sumeria and King of Uruk. Do not be afraid… I am good to my friends.
hateHello: Hah! Gilgamesh is stronger than your false words.
tradeRequest: All the world knows of my generosity to my friends.
uniques: [+2 Culture] [in all cities] <after discovering [Drama and Poetry]>

name: Norway
startIntroPart1: Harald Hardrada, the last great Viking warrior-king, your name echoes through the ages. From your early days as a mercenary in the Byzantine Empire to your rise as King of Norway, your life has been a testament to strength, cunning, and unyielding ambition. Your campaigns have set the stage for a new era of Norse dominance. The winds of fate howl through the fjords, calling you to greatness once more.
startIntroPart2: The Great King of Norway, The Thunderbolt of the North, your people call upon you once more. Will you lead them to glory as you did in the battles of Stiklestad and Niså? Can you reclaim the throne of England and show the world the true power ? Will you build a civilization that will stand the test of time?
declaringWar: Now comes a storm you cannot escape. You can only hope for a quick death! To victory! To Odin's halls!
attacked: This will make a great saga! The skalds will sing of my valor! Let us see if the same will go to you!
defeated: Joke's on you. I will join the einherjar in Valhalla and feast, while you toil away here.
introduction: Harald Sigurdsson stands before you: a Viking unlike any the seas and lands have ever known. Hah, are you afraid?
hateHello: Your seas are unprotected, friend. All too easy to raid.
tradeRequest: I have sent you traders with gifts of rune stones. They are powerful. I mean, the stones, not the traders.
uniques: [+1 Production, +2 Gold] from [Deer] tiles [in all cities]
[+1 Faith, +1 Culture] in cities on [Tundra] tiles

name: Vandal
attacked: The war has hardened us, but it has not broken us
uniques: All newly-trained [Water] units [in all cities] receive the [Boarding Party I] promotion
All newly-trained [Water] units [in all cities] receive the [Boarding Party II] promotion
All newly-trained [Water] units [in all cities] receive the [Boarding Party III] promotion
All newly-trained [Land] units [in all cities] receive the [Charge] promotion
When defeating a [{Barbarian} {Water}] unit, earn [250] Gold and recruit it <with [100]% chance>
When conquering an encampment, earn [250] Gold and recruit a Barbarian unit <with [100]% chance>

name: Ayyubids
startIntroPart1: Peace and blessings be upon you, oh great Saladin! From humble beginnings in a Kurdish family, your upbringing in Damascus saw you excel in all which you took part in. It was under your leadership that combined Muslim armies defeated the ambitious Crusaders of Europe in a series of victories in which you overcame overwhelming odds in order to prevail. None could stand against you, and your forces became pivotal in driving the Christians out of the Holy Land once more. From your stronghold of Cairo, you established the Ayyubid dynasty, one which would come to rule vast swathes of land, from Tunisia in the west to Mesopotamia in the East and Nubia in the South. Despite your overwhelming military power, you remained chivalrous, for which even your most fervent of enemies respected you. The Ayyubid dynasty lasted long after your death, defeating all those who wished to take her land for centuries before finally succumbing to threats from within.
startIntroPart2: Oh great Saladin, your people look to you to rebuild the might of the Ayyubid dynasty. Can you once again strike fear into the hearts and minds of your enemies with but a whisper of your name? Will your dominion will be respected by all of your neighbours, even your enemies? Can you build a civilization that can stand the test of time?
declaringWar: The time has come to meet your end! For the Ayyubid Dynasty!
attacked: We will never surrender to the likes of you, herectis!
defeated: Maybe the prophecy was false after all...
introduction: May the Lord guide your soul, leader one. I am Saladin, the sultan of Ayyubids.
hateHello: Spew nonsense, and I will behead you in front of the public.
tradeRequest: I propose for a trading treaty that might interest you.
uniques: [2] free [Mamluk] units appear <upon gaining a [Great Prophet] unit> <with [60]% chance>

name: Belgium
declaringWar: For the good of the Empire i must declare war!
attacked: You are making a big mistake.
defeated: Will this be my last goodbye to you?.
introduction: Tell me, are you a barbarian, or are you as civilized as we are?
tradeRequest: It appears that you do have a reason for existing – to make this deal with me.
uniques: [+3 Gold] from all [Market] buildings <starting from the [Industrial era]>
[+3 Production] from all [Workshop] buildings <starting from the [Industrial era]>

name: Normandy
startIntroPart1: Hail to thee, great Duke William of Normandy! Your people are a proud and noble race; hailing from their beginnings as Viking warriors, the Normans quickly established themselves as a persevering and formidable culture. Taking for themselves a land of their own in France, the Normans would spread their martial and cultural influence across Europe and the Mediterranean. With conquests in Southern Italy, Northern Africa, and the Levant, the might and piety of the Normans would know no match and, with you, Duke, at its stead, history would weave Normandy's boldest claim; for that of the throne of England, of which it would take, and change forever.
startIntroPart2: Noble William, who took Excalibur and seized the ancient throne of the Britons, it is time to lay claim to the lands that are rightfully yours. Can you inspire the martial glory of your people once more? Can you build a civilization that will stand the test of time?
declaringWar: Honestly, I grow tired of this peace between us. Don't be surprised: that is to be expected from a people of Viking ancestry.
attacked: I adamantly refuse to willingly cede you my throne: take it from my cold, dead hands, if you dare!
defeated: Your victory humbles me; to the victor go the spoils and I shall stand in your way no more.
introduction: Hail to you. I am William, Duke of Normandy. Bring not misfortune to my court and we shall be fond allies.
tradeRequest: We are more than warriors, and this deal can prove it.
uniques: Upon capturing a city, receive [4] times its [Gold] production as [Gold] immediately

name: English
declaringWar: You are in my way, you must be destroyed.
attacked: As a matter of fact I too grow weary of peace.
defeated: You have somehow become my undoing! What kind of beast are you?
tradeRequest: My friend, does this seem reasonable to you?
uniques: [+1 Science] per [3] social policies adopted <starting from the [Medieval era]>
[+15]% Production when constructing [Warrior] units [in all cities]
[+10]% Production when constructing [Scout] units [in all cities]

name: Goths
startIntroPart1: Hail Alaric, King of the Visigoths, Sacker of Rome! Your people shout your name and raise their swords to you! From the shores of Scandinavia your people came and spread across Europe. In the East, the Ostrogoths successfully revolted against the Huns. In the West, the Visigoths conquered Iberia. Even the eternal city fell before your might in 410 BCE, marking the definitive decline of the Western Roman Empire! Yet, you also possessed the heart and wisdom of a true leader: you forced the senate to free the slaves and treated her citizens with kindness, and paid homage to their gods and let all worship as they might. However - divided, conquered, forgotten - the legacy of the Goths has faded with the passage of time.
startIntroPart2: Mighty King, once again the glories and riches of civilization stand before you. New cities have emerged, their towers scraping the very heavens themselves. The noble blood of your people cries out to you, and your warriors stand ready to fight any danger and gain greater glory! Will you claim these newfound riches as your own? Can you build a civilization that will stand the test of time?
declaringWar: Consider this an honour, to fight and even die at the hands of the Horde of the Goths!
attacked: Another war? Fine by me: I hate standing fat on my throne.
defeated: My blood may stain your sword, but remember that even the greatest cities eventually fall.
introduction: I am Alaric I, and as my name suggests, I rule all over the land that we Goths have conquered.
tradeRequest: While I'm here, let me visit your lands, so I can see if there's anything worthy grabbing...

name: Franks
startIntroPart1: Hail to Charles the Great, first Emperor since the Fall of Rome, father of a kingdom that encompassed France, Germany, Italy and much of Eastern Europe. Legends of your conquests are pervasive throughout history, and you are without no doubts one of the greatest figureheads of history. The world has known you as both a highly religious man and a philanthropist. You often built friendly relationships with other countries, such as Egypt and India, so that you could later send money in an effort to assist struggling Christians in those regions. Although much more of a conqueror than an economic or social reformer, you have always helped the poor and sick in your kingdom. Despite being unable to write well yourself, you had a vast love of literature and education. Due to your conquests contacts with many different cultures and learning institutions, your era is became known as the Carolingian Renaissance, with a blossoming of the arts and sciences.
startIntroPart2: Great father of Europe, the one who rebuilt an empire of western Europe, almighty ruler and wise man, the world needs you once more to fulfill the empty pages of history with glorious deeds and epic battles. Shall you once more bring the light to the ones lost in the shadow? Can you build a civilization that will stand the test of time?
declaringWar: I can't deny that I am truly disappointed by this situation. I do hope you are prepared to battle with me, nonetheless.
attacked: It is fine, I am always ready for war, especially with my paladins at my side.
defeated: To think that I was once a great emperor, and now I must pledge your loyalty to you.
introduction: So you have come. Greetings, I, Charles The Great, as the emperor of the Frankish state, bestow my blessing upon thou.
tradeRequest: Your Emperor asks you to consider this deal, for it guarantees the good relations between our dominions.

name: Canada
startIntroPart1: Greetings to John A. MacDonald, the first Prime Minister of Canada and father of Confederation. You united a vast and rugged land with railroads and resolve, crafting a peaceful dominion from coast to coast under the maple leaf's proud shade.
startIntroPart2: Sir MacDonald, your nation calls once more. Will you lead with civility and strength, building a new era of peace and prosperity? Can you create a civilization that stands the test of time?
declaringWar: Regretfully, you've forced my hand. Canada shall rise, even through conflict.
attacked: This is not the path we wished, but Canada will endure. We always do.
defeated: You may conquer our land, but never our quiet strength or spirit.
introduction: Welcome to Canada. As their first Prime Minister, I give you my warmest welcome.
neutralHello: Canada welcomes respectful dialogue. Our wilderness is vast, but our hearts are fair.
hateHello: I hoped we could meet in peace, but your actions leave no room for kindness or trust.
tradeRequest: There's no frontier too distant for fair trade. Let's build something enduring together.
uniques: Gain [15] Influence with a [Military] gift to a City-State
Gain [30] Influence with a [Scout] gift to a City-State

name: Confederacy
declaringWar: Your wanton aggression leaves us no choice. Prepare for war!
attacked: You have mistaken our love of peace for weakness. You shall regret this!
defeated: The day... is yours. I hope you will be merciful in your triumph.
denounced: Pathetic. If empty threats is the worst you can do, then what hope does your nation have to prove itself better than mine?
introduction: The people of the Confederate States of America welcome you.
tradeRequest: Is the following trade of interest to you?
uniqueText:
Plantations yield +50% more of their respective stats
Workers cost 25% less [Gold] to be purchased
Cities within 3 tiles of a plantation suffer from 10% more unhappiness from population
uniques: [+10]% Unhappiness from [Population] [in all cities] <within [3] tiles of a [Plantation]>

spyNames.name: Boers
spyNames.startIntroPart1: Greetings, and may God be with you, President Paul Kruger, leader of the Boer people! The Boers are a brave and expansive culture, seeking a land to call their own in defiance of imperial aggression, and with disregard for native empires. Setting out into the tribal wilderness of South Africa, two Boer Republics resisted British Rule throughout the Scramble for Africa: Transvaal, over which you ruled, and the Orange Free State. Following the annexation of Transvaal by the British Empire, you lead a resistance movement, leading to the First Boer War. The Boers proved victorious, your skillful negotiations securing Transvaal's independence under British suzerainty. Elected President of the newly-united South African Republic four times, your bold diplomacy and characteristic image cemented Boer culture in Africa, and in history!
spyNames.startIntroPart2: Uncle Paul, your people are in need of guidance once again. Will you reunite the Boers of the world and lead them to power and glory? Can you prove that the heart of a Boer spans further than any earthly empire's borders? Will you build a Civilization to stand the test of time?
spyNames.declaringWar: It appears time for peace is over: perhaps some reshapements in your dominions is in order...
spyNames.attacked: Be warned: this land is off-limits for imperalistic aggressions. You'll soon leard the error of this decision of yours.
spyNames.defeated: ...is it too late for negotiations? I presume suzerainty is out of the question...
spyNames.introduction: Welkom, I am the elected President of South Africa, some call me the face of the Boer cause. Though my name may be difficult and long to memorize, you can call me Paul for short.
spyNames.tradeRequest: Let us not quarrel like jackals over scraps. Trade brings peace better than powder.
uniques: [+1 Food] from every [Farm] <with [3] to [6] neighboring [Farm] tiles>
[+1 Gold] from every [Farm] <with [4] to [6] neighboring [Farm] tiles>
[+1 Production] from every [Farm] <with [5] to [6] neighboring [Farm] tiles>
[+1 Culture, +1 Science] from every [Farm] <with [6] to [6] neighboring [Farm] tiles>

spyNames.name: Manchu
spyNames.startIntroPart1: The Eight Banners bow down before you, oh great Nurhaci, Brilliant Khan Who Benefits All Nations, unifier of the Manchu peoples! Under your rule, a collection of scattered Jurchen tribes were unified into a great empire! Your reign was a period of great victory and progress for the Manchu people, consisting of constantly successful campaigns against the Ming, the Koreans, the Mongols and other Jurchen tribes. Truly, no empire in East Asia could withstand the might of the Manchu! Your reign is notable for more than sheer conquest, however, with great and important leaps in Manchu culture, such as the funding of the Eight Banners and the creation of a Manchu Alphabet. And your successors would build off your great achievements, conquering the entirety of China and founding one of the greatest dynasties of all time!
spyNames.startIntroPart2: Oh, bold and noble Khan and Chieftain, the empire your actions shaped has fallen, and the Manchu have been reduced to a mere minority group in another nation's empire. But your people call your name unto the heavens, desperate for your strong and wise leadership to lead them to glory once more! Will you ride with your Bannermen to the field of battle once more? Will you build a civilization to stand the test of time?
spyNames.defeated: You have bested me, warrior. I have no choice but to submit. Which banner shall I be allocated to? What do you mean, 'we don't sort our troops by banner'?!
spyNames.introduction: You stand before Nurhaci, Brilliant Khan Who Benefits All Nations. Will you be a worthwhile ally or mere fodder for my armies?
spyNames.tradeRequest: If you seek peace beyond the mountains, then bring silver, silk, and good intent with you.
uniques: [+100]% Production when constructing [Stable] buildings [in all cities]

spyNames.name: Hittites
spyNames.startIntroPart1: Hail Muwatallis, King of the Hittites, who held the line at Kadesh and ruled a realm of iron and order. Your empire stood firm between Egypt and the sea, shaping laws and battles alike.
spyNames.startIntroPart2: Great King, will you renew your dominion over the fertile lands and ancient routes? Can you build a civilization that will stand the test of time?
spyNames.declaringWar: The Oracle of Hattusa has called: war must be between us, and blood must flow!
spyNames.attacked: If you really want to destroy the oath I had in store for you, then may the Gods destroy you in turn, along with your wives, your sons, your households, and your lands!
spyNames.defeated: Deceptive are you, great God, to come wreathed in the body of a mortal! Your humble servant is ready to be borne to the starlight shore.
spyNames.introduction: Greetings, stranger. I am Muwatallis, King of the Empire Of Hattusa. Have you come to see the Hittites greatest achievement?
spyNames.neutralHello: The walls of Hattusa still stand, as do our traditions. Speak, if you come in peace.
spyNames.hateHello: You come with arrogance, not respect. Tread carefully—you test Hittite patience.
spyNames.tradeRequest: The King of the Land of Hatti invites you as his brother, to establish peace and fraternity between us in the eyes of the gods.
spyNames.uniqueName: Land of a Thousand Gods of Bronze and Iron
uniques: [+2 Gold] from every [Mine] <with [3] to [6] neighboring [Mine] tiles>

spyNames.name: Byzantium
spyNames.startIntroPart1: All hail the most magnificent and magnanimous Empress Theodora, beloved of Byzantium and of Rome! From the lowly ranks of actress and courtesan you became the most powerful woman in the Roman Empire, consort to Justinian I. Starting in the late 520's AD, you joined your husband in a series of important spiritual and legal reforms, creating many laws which elevated the status of and promoted equal treatment of women in the empire. You also aided in the restoration and construction of many aqueducts, bridges and churches across Constantinople, culminating in the creation of the Hagia Sophia, one of the most splendid architectural wonders of the world.
spyNames.startIntroPart2: Beautiful Empress, Byzantium is in need of your wisdom and strength - her people are lost without your light to lead them. The Byzantine Empire may have fallen once, but its spirit is still intact waiting to be reborn anew. Can you return Byzantium to the heights of glory it once enjoyed? Can you create a civilization to stand the test of time?
spyNames.declaringWar: It has always been a shame throwing away beauty. Thankfully, not like that.
spyNames.attacked: Now that riots are needed, friend, we'll teach you a lesson.
spyNames.defeated: I hope you knew that to act like that. Just know that in this world nobody will aid a traitor.
spyNames.introduction: Oh! A miracle in front of my eyes. What is the name of this good stranger? I am Theodora, friend of Byzantium.
spyNames.tradeRequest: I heard nice things from you in your latest sayings...show me.
spyNames.uniqueText: May choose a second Founder belief upon founding a religion, followed by Missionaries appearing after founding a religion
uniques: Gain a free [Founder] belief <upon founding a Religion>

spyNames.name: Egypt
spyNames.startIntroPart1: We greet thee, oh great Ramesses, Pharaoh of Egypt, who causes the sun to rise and the Nile to flow, and who blesses his fortunate people with all the good things of life! Oh great lord, from time immemorial your people lived on the banks of the Nile river, where they brought writing to the world, and advanced mathematics, sculpture, and architecture. Thousands of years ago they created the great monuments which still stand tall and proud.
spyNames.startIntroPart2: Oh, Ramesses, for uncounted years your people endured, as other petty nations around them have risen and then fallen into dust. They look to you to lead them once more into greatness. Can you honor the gods and bring Egypt back to her rightful place at the very center of the world? Can you build a civilization that will stand the test of time?
spyNames.declaringWar: You are but a pest on this Earth, prepare to be eliminated!
spyNames.attacked: You are a fool who evokes pity. You have brought my hostility upon yourself and your repulsive civilization!
spyNames.defeated: Strike me down and my soul will torment yours forever, you have won nothing.
spyNames.introduction: Greetings, I am Ramesses the god. I am the living embodiment of Egypt, mother and father of all civilizations.
spyNames.tradeRequest: Generous Egypt makes you this offer.
uniques: [+15]% Production when constructing [All] wonders [in all cities]
Provides a [Burial Tomb] in your first [5] cities for free <upon discovering [Masonry] technology>

spyNames.name: Austria
spyNames.startIntroPart1: Noble and pious Queen Maria Theresa, Holy Roman Empress and sovereign of Austria, the people revere your grace. After the death of your father King Charles VI, you inherited the throne of Austria during difficult economic and military times. But you used your wisdom and unflinching determination to fend off your foes and resolve any obstacles to stability and prosperity. With your husband Francis Stephen at your side as co-ruler, you assured your place as Empress of the Holy Roman Empire. During your reign, you reformed Austria in several domains, as you gifted it with a powerful army, a stable economic model, and an improved educational system.
spyNames.startIntroPart2: O Great Queen, proud and dignified, by the will of God and the Divine right, can you reach the height of prosperity and splendor the kingdom of Austria deserves? Will your new empire shine through the ages of history?
spyNames.declaringWar: Shame that it has come this far. But ye wished it so. Next time, be so good, choose your words more wisely.
spyNames.attacked: What a fool ye are! Ye will end swiftly and miserably.
spyNames.defeated: The world is pitiful! There's no beauty in it, no wisdom. I am almost glad to go.
spyNames.introduction: The archduchess of Austria welcomes your Eminence to... Oh let's get this over with! I have a luncheon at four o'clock.
spyNames.tradeRequest: I see you admire my new damask. Nobody should say that I am an unjust woman. Let's reach an agreement!
uniques: Can spend Gold to annex or puppet a City-State that has been your Ally for [7] turns
[+15]% [Production] [in all cities] <if [Coffee House] is constructed in all [non-[Puppeted]] cities>

spyNames.name: England
spyNames.startIntroPart1: Praises upon her serene highness, Queen Elizabeth Gloriana. You lead and protect the celebrated maritime nation of England. England is an ancient land, settled as early as 35,000 years ago. The island has seen countless waves of invaders, each in turn becoming a part of the fabric of the people. Although England is a small island, for many years your people dominated the world stage. Their matchless navy, brilliant artists and shrewd merchants, giving them power and influence far in excess of their mere numbers.
spyNames.startIntroPart2: Queen Elizabeth, will you bring about a new golden age for the English people? They look to you once more to return peace and prosperity to the nation. Will you take up the mantle of greatness? Can you build a civilization that will stand the test of time?
spyNames.declaringWar: By the grace of God, your days are numbered.
spyNames.defeated: You have triumphed over us. The day is yours.
spyNames.introduction: We are pleased to meet you.
spyNames.tradeRequest: Would you be interested in a trade agreement with England?
uniques: [+100]% Production when constructing [Police Station] buildings [in all cities]
[+100]% Production when constructing [Constabulary] buildings [in all cities]
Gain an extra spy <upon entering the [Renaissance era]>

spyNames.name: Venice
spyNames.startIntroPart1: Greetings, most astute Doge Enrico Dandolo of Venice, master of statecraft and shrewd negotiator. Although you rose to power late in life, old age did little to slow your cunning or ambition, as you deftly managed the bustling commercial center of Venice during a time of great instability. In aligning yourself with the Fourth Crusade, you carefully gained a strategic advantage and used the Crusaders to reacquire lost territory for Venice. Your role in guiding the Crusaders during the sacking of Constantinople led to an even greater expansion of your power, and secured your legacy throughout history.
spyNames.startIntroPart2: Most insightful and cunning Doge, Venice once again requires the service of a skilled leader, one who can bring the republic back to the forefront of world affairs. Can you establish your nation through careful trade, or will you work to conquer your enemies through diplomacy? Can you build a civilization that will stand the test of time?
spyNames.declaringWar: When you will be gone, Sir, there will be more for me!
spyNames.attacked: You have revealed your purposes too early, my friend!
spyNames.defeated: A wrong calculation, on my part.
spyNames.denounced: I have little concern for such obvious bluster.
spyNames.introduction: Welcome to Venice. I am Doge Enrico Dandolo.
spyNames.tradeRequest: This offer won't be valid for a lot of time, think about it.
uniques: Double the normal number of Trade Routes available
Free [Merchant of Venice] appears <upon discovering [Optics] technology>
May buy items in puppet cities

spyNames.name: The Huns
spyNames.startIntroPart1: Great Attila, mighty warrior and leader of the Hunnic empire, your men bow down before you. During the 5th century, you and your brother Bleda have conquered many lands, forged a mighty empire and commanded the most powerful and frightening force of antiquity. You inspired fear to the Roman Emperors themselves, who called you 'Flagellum Dei', the 'Scourge of God', as you took kingdom after kingdom in the Balkans, invaded Eastern Roman Empire, into Gaul and Northern Italy, and planned to conquer Rome itself. Your empire didn't survive long after your death, but your name and your legend have, for millenia to come.
spyNames.startIntroPart2: Fearsome General, your mighty hordes are at your command, waiting to crush your foes once again and to conquer all the riches the world has to offer! Will your new empire shine through the ages of history?
spyNames.declaringWar: I grow tired of this throne. I think I should like to have yours instead.
spyNames.defeated: My people will mourn me not with tears, but with human blood.
spyNames.denounced: Do you know who you're dealing with?
spyNames.attacked: Now what is this?! You ask me to add your riches to my great avails. The invitation is accepted.
spyNames.introduction: You are in the presence of Attila, scourge of Rome. Do not let hubris be your downfall as well.
spyNames.tradeRequest: This is better than you deserve, but let it not be said that I am an unfair man.
uniques: Cities are razed [2] times as fast
[6] free [Horse Archer] units appear <upon entering a new era> <after turn number [3]> <hidden from users>
[4] units cost no maintenance <hidden from users>
